name: ship-pr-dev
title: Ship PR
description: Prepare a branch for a human-mergeable PR by finishing scoped work, running verification, using read-only review gates, committing, pushing, creating or updating the PR, and monitoring CI without merging it.
notes:
## What it does

Ship PR is a delivery orchestrator for getting code into a clean pull request. It may edit code, run checks, commit, push, create or update a PR, and iterate on failing CI, but it never merges. The output is a PR that a human can review and merge with clear evidence.

## Review dependency

Ship PR requires Mega Code Review as its independent read-only gate. After local verification passes, it runs Mega Code Review against the branch/base diff, fixes confirmed P0/P1/P2 issues in the main ship loop, reruns verification, and records the result. Frontend diffs are routed through Mega Code Review's frontend mode; Ship PR does not depend on frontend design sub-skills directly.

## Safety model

- Never merges, force-pushes, hard resets, drops user work, skips checks, disables validations, or uses no-verify without explicit instruction.
- Stages only intentional files.
- Writes local shipping artifacts under ignored plans/ship-pr-dev/runs/.
- Stops instead of claiming merge-readiness when credentials, checks, CI, review gates, or scope separation are unresolved.

## Output

The final handoff includes the PR URL or blocked reason, latest commit, branch/base, local verification summary, CI status, Mega Code Review result, frontend gate status when relevant, remaining human decisions, and local artifact path.

changes: Require explicit worktree inclusion for the independent pre-commit review gate.
Include dirty worktree paths in impact classification and validate the review dependency identity and minimum version.
Use stable review-code-dev CLI and JSON contracts for shared review context and artifact preparation.
Improve TypeScript, rename, CircleCI, and dependency-install detection with regression tests.
Remove the direct frontend design skill dependency from Ship PR.
Route frontend PR scrutiny exclusively through Mega Code Review frontend mode.
Use frontend gate wording so Ship PR stays an orchestration skill.
Strengthen the workflow with base-branch diff diagnostics, read-only review board, frontend gate, CI-to-green loop, and final freshness check.
Add deterministic branch context collection script.
Expand readiness evidence for review board, frontend gate, and CI status.
Initial Ship PR workflow with bounded implementation, verification, Mega Code Review gate, commit, push, and PR handoff.
Add non-committable artifact preparation under plans/ship-pr-dev/runs/.
Add readiness gates and PR body template.

commands.name: Ship branch as PR
commands.desc: Finish scoped work, verify, review with Mega Code Review, commit, push, and create or update a PR.

commands.name: Prepare local PR handoff
commands.desc: Run the same cleanup, verification, and review loop but stop before pushing.

commands.name: Update existing PR
commands.desc: Apply requested fixes or review feedback, rerun verification and Mega Code Review, push, and update the PR body.
